mapper.update:
UPDATE nlbuser
password = #{uvo.password},
nickname = #{uvo.nickname},
WHERE user_id = #{uvo.userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nlbuser (login_id, password, nickname, email, user_role, is_active, reg_date) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{userRole}, TRUE, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nlbuser WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nlbuser WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nlbuser WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT login_id FROM nlbuser WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT * FROM nlbuser WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND email = #{email}
SELECT nickname FROM nlbuser WHERE user_id = #{userId}
